name: Google Play Console MCP
description: Manage Google Play Store production releases from your AI assistant — promote builds, adjust rollout percentages, check review status, and fetch crash-rate vitals.

tools.name: promote_to_production
tools.description: Promote an app build from the internal track to production with a staged rollout.

tools.name: check_review_status
tools.description: Check the current production release status (draft, inProgress, halted, completed) and rollout percentages.

tools.name: update_rollout_percentage
tools.description: Update the rollout percentage for the current production release.

tools.name: get_production_release_info
tools.description: Fetch the current production release info: rollout percentage, version codes, status, and release notes.

tools.name: get_crash_rate
tools.description: Fetch user-perceived crash rate via the Google Play Developer Reporting API, broken down by version code.
